title: 4K TRAVEL TV
name: 4k-travel-tv
description: 4K TRAVEL TV is a 4K channel with breathtaking images in impressive resolution to discover the most fascinating travel destinations, cultures, and heritage. With 4K TRAVEL you will discover the world in 4K. The most amazing destinations that will awaken your curiosity and make you want to know more. 4K TRAVEL takes you to discover the wonders of the world, flying over the most beautiful sites. 4K TRAVEL allows you to know the history of each city visited, its particularity, the origins of its creation and the habits of its people. Thanks to its 4K technology, 4K TRAVEL makes you dive into the image, with a very high definition and a depth of field close to a three-dimensional vision. Travel to new destinations every day, as if you were there.

title: ENCORE+
name: encore
description: All your movies in one place. From old to new, from classics to chillers and from laughs to thrillers, all the movies you ever wanted are now in one place. ENCORE+ is covering all genres. ENCORE+ is an iconic movie channel, with all the cult and must-see movies you must see at least once in your life. ENCORE+ is aimed at the largest number of viewers and takes you to the discovery of reference films released from 1980 to today and awarded in the biggest festivals or by peers. Most of us like to watch movies. Of course, the genres we like differ, but there's nothing better than getting lost in a different world filled with a story, setting and characters for a few hours. Thanks to ENCORE+, the whole family can agree and watch the movie they want. There is something for everyone.

title: KOZOOM TV
name: kozoom-tv
description: Billiards is one of the most played game in the world. Kozoom TV offers free 24/7 billiards programming. You can watch tournaments from around the world, as well as original programming. For amateurs, it is easy to see your favorite players from all over the world compete on the biggest billiards stage! Kozoom TV is broadcasting all kind of billiards matches such as French Billiards, Carom Billiards, or Pool Billiards. Kozoom TV is made by Billiards Professional who live this Sport. But Kozoom TV is not only the biggest competitions, it is also learning how to play billiards with Masterclass videos and great matches of Carom and Pool commented by top players. Kozoom.com is the first European channel dedicated to billiard fans and offers the most complete experience to billiard lovers. Since 1998, Kozoom has been involved in the promotion of billiards, and now Kozoom TV brings you Billiards at home.

title: Bollywood Classic
name: bollywood-classic
description: We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. title: TV9 Bangla
name: tv9-bangla
description: TV9 Bangla was launched in April 2021 in the middle of the second wave of the Covid-19 pandemic. With its fair and robust brand of journalism, TV9 Bangla has created top-of-the-mind recall in a very short period. In the very first year of operations, the channel won accolades at the Indian Telly Awards 2022 in the Best Factual Entertainment Show/Documentary category. In its short journey so far, TV9 Bangla has differentiated itself from competitors in the market with creative and intellectually rich content such as Bangaliana Telethon, Bangaliana Baithak, Nakkhatra Samman and programmes such as News Series. TV9 Bangla is helmed by Amritanshu Bhattacharya.

title: TV9 Bharatvarsh
name: tv9-bharatvarsh
description: TV9 Bharatvarsh has become the country’s most watched national Hindi news channel. It has scripted history to be crowned the No.1 Hindi news channel in the country. The channel’s coverage of landmark news events – such as the Russia-Ukraine war, the Covid-19 pandemic and the Uttar Pradesh election to name just three – marked by its editorial prowess, newsroom innovation, impeccable packaging and unrivaled ground reportage, saw it rise sharply up the ratings ladder. This rise has been consistent over the last two years. Its relaunch in March 2020 coincided with the Covid-19 lockdown. With people confined to their houses for months, news viewership grew exponentially. The channel’s contemporary look and feel and its innovative content offering, received a ready, wide audience. Within three months, the channel rose to the top of the pile hitting the number 2 slot also on a few occasions. The upward trajectory continued until ratings were unfortunately suspended in October 2020. Undeterred, the channel continued to challenge and better itself this was reflected once ratings resumed after 17 months. TV9 Bharatvarsh trounced the legacy leader of 22 years on March 17, 2022. The remarkable turnaround has proved to be historic. Our Hindi flagship channel created several firsts: use of newsroom studios, packaging, and reimagined prime time. TV9 Bharatvarsh has become a case study itself where leadership is manifest in every second of its airtime offering.

title: TV9 Gujarati
name: tv9-gujarati
description: TV9 Gujarati is the leading news platform in Gujarat both in its broadcasting and digital avatars. The Gujarati language platform has been unstoppable since its launch, retaining its leadership position. With its tagline of Garv Chhe Gujarati Chhun (Proud to be Gujarati), TV9 Gujarati has been the chronicler of Gujarati pride. True to its tagline, the platform also celebrates the entrepreneurial spirit of Gujarat. For the discerning audience in Gujarat, TV9 Gujarati is the go-to brand that disseminates clear, precise and insightful news. TV9 Gujarati’s mission has been to continue advancing and improving the quality of news dissemination in Gujarati. Today, Gujaratis all over the world turn to TV9 Gujarati for any news from the region. Be it a natural disaster or an important political development, TV9 Gujarati rises to the occasion to provide structured information to its viewers with people-centricity at the core of its reporting. With a pro-people motto, both the TV and digital platforms of TV9 Gujarati have come to rule the hearts of viewers.

title: TV9 Kannada
name: tv9-kannada
description: TV9 Kannada is Karnataka’s No. 1 news channel by far, with a market bigger than that of its No. 2 and No. 3 rivals combined. The first news channel to be launched in the state in 2006, it has maintained its position as the definitive market leader. TV9 Kannada, part of India’s biggest news network, offers the most comprehensive, authoritative, and unbiased coverage of news across the state, nation, and the world. Its news-based programmes routinely feature among the top shows in BARC’s weekly ratings of news shows. The channel boasts of the biggest news gathering team in the state, with its own dedicated reporters and camerapersons in all of Karnataka’s 31 districts. Over the years, TV9 Kannada has served as the go-to channel for news consumers from across the social strata--be it the common man, the intelligentsia, or the elite. With its sharp focus on fact-checked news breaks and insightful analysis, TV9 Kannada offers the most comprehensive news coverage to viewers. The channel’s guiding principle continues to be “Uttama Samajakkage” - “for a better society”. TV9 Kannada is at the forefront of all issues that affect Kannadigas - floods, polluting industries, disease, or corruption in public life. TV9 Kannada’s digital offerings on the web, social media, and YouTube have the highest following among all the Kannada news channels.

title: TV9 Marathi
name: tv9-marathi
description: TV9 Marathi is a responsible news brand which has been consistently delivering news in its purest form. TV9 Marathi became the most preferred Marathi news channel in Maharashtra in 2022. It is the No. 1 channel across both the urban and rural Maharashtra/ Goa markets. With a reach of more than 23 million viewers, it also generates more than 38 million impressions per week. TV9 Marathi is the fastest in providing news to viewers and is driven by the renewed philosophy of “Kalji Tumchi Hith Maharashtrache" (Viewers’ concerns and in the interest of Maharashtra). TV9 Marathi stands for fearless and bold journalism. The channel is led by experienced journalist Mr. Umesh Kumawat, known for his aggressive and fearless style.

title: TV9 Telugu USA
name: tv9-telugu-usa
description: TV9 entered the Telugu electronic media space in 2004, during its nascent stage. Since that time, TV9’s slogan, “Towards Better Society”, has been not just a mere tagline but the guiding philosophy and driving policy of TV9 Telugu. TV9 has consistently portrayed news as news and has become synonymous with unbiased news and courageous investigative journalism. On behalf of the people, TV9 has unravelled several bribery cases through its powerful sting operations. Over the years, TV9 has stood as the voice of the voiceless and for the betterment of the citizenry. Whether it is an accident, bomb blast, natural calamity, unforeseen incident, political event or a high-profile case, whether it is in India or abroad, the TV9 Telegu team is at the scene first. With its unique news presentation and credibility, TV9 Telugu has become the No.1 news channel in the twin Telugu states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Rajnikanth Vellalacheruvu leads the TV9 Telugu team.

title: FEVA TV
name: feva-tv
description: FEVA TV (First Entertainment Voice of Africa) is a Canada based global television network that caters to the African, Black, and Caribbean audience. The channel deals with music, movies, news, sports, drama, documentaries and other exciting programs that affect the global black community. Since its launch within Canada, the service began expansion globally through distribution agreements with Flow, which saw the channel launch in the summer of 2015 in Flow’s markets in the Caribbean including Antigua, Barbados, Curaçao, Grenada, Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, St. Lucia, and St. Vincent & the Grenadines. In addition, the channel reached its first African distribution agreement with AzamTV, launching on its system in Tanzania, Uganda, Kenya, Burundi, Rwanda, and Malawi.

Since its launch within Canada, the service began expansion globally through distribution agreements with Flow, which saw the channel launch in the summer of 2015 in Flow’s markets in the Caribbean including Antigua, Barbados, Curaçao, Grenada, Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, St. Lucia, and St. Vincent & the Grenadines. In addition, the channel reached its first African distribution agreement with AzamTV, launching on its system in Tanzania, Uganda, Kenya, Burundi, Rwanda, and Malawi.

title: FEVA MUSIC
name: feva-music
description: FEVA MUSIC is a vibrant and captivating music TV channel that celebrates the rich musical heritage of Africans, Blacks, and Caribbeans. It serves as a platform for showcasing the diverse and dynamic sounds that have emerged from these cultures, providing an immersive experience for music enthusiasts worldwide. From Afrobeats and Reggae to Hip-Hop and Dancehall, Soca, Amapiano and many others, FEVA MUSIC is dedicated to bringing the best of African, Black, and Caribbean music to the forefront. With a lineup that features a mix of music videos, live performances, interviews, and documentaries, FEVA MUSIC offers a comprehensive and engaging viewing experience. The channel not only highlights established and emerging artists but also explores the cultural significance and influence of African, Black, and Caribbean music on a global scale. FEVA MUSIC creates an inclusive space that celebrates the power of music to connect people across borders, while also amplifying the voices and stories of underrepresented communities. Whether you're a fan of infectious rhythms, thought-provoking lyrics, or simply looking to discover new musical talents, FEVA MUSIC is your go-to destination for an electrifying journey through the vibrant world of African, Black, and Caribbean music.

title: MomCave
name: momcave
description: MomCave - An edgy alternative to mom bloggers!”--Forbes "It's like Wayne's World for moms!" --Brooklyn Mama MomCave is an award-winning channel of comedy videos for parents with a sense of humor. Sometimes called the anti-Pinterest of Parenting, MomCave has become. thriving online community, producing scripted web series like "SLACKER MOM" and "Slummy Mummy," real-mom docuseries like "Blabbermom", interactive online talk shows like "MomCave LIVE" and even a naughty interactive game show called "MOM GAMES." Being chosen for YouTube's Women in Comedy Initiative, nominated for awards like Best Comedy Duo, Best Live Series, and Best Hosted Series has almost made up for all the times our kids threw up on us.

title: Urban Action Channel
name: urban-action-channel
description: Urban Action Channel - Take a trip back in time and revisit the pulse pounding Urban Action classic movies of the 70's and beyond. From Hollywood to Harlem and back you'll get all the must-see Classics with stars like Fred Williamson, Teresa Graves and lots more. In addition, rarely seen historically significant gems featuring icons such as Josephine Baker and legendary boxing champion  Joe Louis are part of the programming mix.  Comprised of hugely popular 1970's films categorized during the period as a subgenre called Blaxploitation. In 1976 noted New York Times film critic Vincent Canby described these movies as "Supercharged, bad-talking, highly romanticized melodramas about Harlem superstuds". The Urban Action Channel is like taking a trip down the Broadway of Urban History.

title: P18 News
name: p18-news
description: P18 News Channel is a trusted and dynamic news platform that delivers accurate and timely news in  Punjabi language. Committed to truth and responsibility, P18 covers national, regional, and local stories with a sharp focus on the issues that matter most to the people of Punjab and beyond. By presenting news in Punjabi, P18 connects deeply with regional audiences, while its Hindi broadcasts expand its reach to viewers across India. The channel’s motto – “Fast and Factual” – reflects its commitment to delivering news that is both quick and credible. P18 avoids sensationalism and fake news, focusing instead on honest journalism and public interest reporting. Available on TV, digital platforms, and social media, P18 ensures that audiences of all age groups stay connected to what’s happening around them.

With its tagline “We Report, You Decide,” the channel offers a wide mix of programming—ranging from investigative reports to entertainment and business news. ABN also reaches millions digitally through AndhraJyothi.com, extending its legacy of bold and impactful journalism.

title: KOZOOM TV

description: Billiards is one of the most played game in the world. Kozoom TV offers free 24/7 billiards programming. You can watch tournaments from around the world, as well as original programming. For amateurs, it is easy to see your favorite players from all over the world compete on the biggest billiards stage! Kozoom TV is broadcasting all kind of billiards matches such as French Billiards, Carom Billiards, or Pool Billiards. Kozoom TV is made by Billiards Professional who live this Sport. But Kozoom TV is not only the biggest competitions, it is also learning how to play billiards with Masterclass videos and great matches of Carom and Pool commented by top players. Kozoom.com is the first European channel dedicated to billiard fans and offers the most complete experience to billiard lovers. Since 1998, Kozoom has been involved in the promotion of billiards, and now Kozoom TV brings you Billiards at home.

title: Bollywood Classic
name: bollywood-classic
description: We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

title: TV9 Bangla
name: tv9-bangla
description: TV9 Bangla was launched in April 2021 in the middle of the second wave of the Covid-19 pandemic. With its fair and robust brand of journalism, TV9 Bangla has created top-of-the-mind recall in a very short period. In the very first year of operations, the channel won accolades at the Indian Telly Awards 2022 in the Best Factual Entertainment Show/Documentary category. In its short journey so far, TV9 Bangla has differentiated itself from competitors in the market with creative and intellectually rich content such as Bangaliana Telethon, Bangaliana Baithak, Nakkhatra Samman and programmes such as News Series. TV9 Bangla is helmed by Amritanshu Bhattacharya.

title: TV9 Bharatvarsh
name: tv9-bharatvarsh
description: TV9 Bharatvarsh has become the country’s most watched national Hindi news channel. It has scripted history to be crowned the No.1 Hindi news channel in the country. The channel’s coverage of landmark news events – such as the Russia-Ukraine war, the Covid-19 pandemic and the Uttar Pradesh election to name just three – marked by its editorial prowess, newsroom innovation, impeccable packaging and unrivaled ground reportage, saw it rise sharply up the ratings ladder. This rise has been consistent over the last two years. Its relaunch in March 2020 coincided with the Covid-19 lockdown. With people confined to their houses for months, news viewership grew exponentially. The channel’s contemporary look and feel and its innovative content offering, received a ready, wide audience. Within three months, the channel rose to the top of the pile hitting the number 2 slot also on a few occasions. The upward trajectory continued until ratings were unfortunately suspended in October 2020. Undeterred, the channel continued to challenge and better itself this was reflected once ratings resumed after 17 months. TV9 Bharatvarsh trounced the legacy leader of 22 years on March 17, 2022. The remarkable turnaround has proved to be historic. Our Hindi flagship channel created several firsts: use of newsroom studios, packaging, and reimagined prime time. TV9 Bharatvarsh has become a case study itself where leadership is manifest in every second of its airtime offering.

title: TV9 Gujarati
name: tv9-gujarati
description: TV9 Gujarati is the leading news platform in Gujarat both in its broadcasting and digital avatars. The Gujarati language platform has been unstoppable since its launch, retaining its leadership position. With its tagline of Garv Chhe Gujarati Chhun (Proud to be Gujarati), TV9 Gujarati has been the chronicler of Gujarati pride. True to its tagline, the platform also celebrates the entrepreneurial spirit of Gujarat. For the discerning audience in Gujarat, TV9 Gujarati is the go-to brand that disseminates clear, precise and insightful news. TV9 Gujarati’s mission has been to continue advancing and improving the quality of news dissemination in Gujarati. Today, Gujaratis all over the world turn to TV9 Gujarati for any news from the region. Be it a natural disaster or an important political development, TV9 Gujarati rises to the occasion to provide structured information to its viewers with people-centricity at the core of its reporting. With a pro-people motto, both the TV and digital platforms of TV9 Gujarati have come to rule the hearts of viewers.

title: TV9 Kannada
name: tv9-kannada
description: TV9 Kannada is Karnataka’s No. 1 news channel by far, with a market bigger than that of its No. 2 and No. 3 rivals combined. The first news channel to be launched in the state in 2006, it has maintained its position as the definitive market leader. TV9 Kannada, part of India’s biggest news network, offers the most comprehensive, authoritative, and unbiased coverage of news across the state, nation, and the world. Its news-based programmes routinely feature among the top shows in BARC’s weekly ratings of news shows. The channel boasts of the biggest news gathering team in the state, with its own dedicated reporters and camerapersons in all of Karnataka’s 31 districts. Over the years, TV9 Kannada has served as the go-to channel for news consumers from across the social strata--be it the common man, the intelligentsia, or the elite. With its sharp focus on fact-checked news breaks and insightful analysis, TV9 Kannada offers the most comprehensive news coverage to viewers. The channel’s guiding principle continues to be “Uttama Samajakkage” - “for a better society”. TV9 Kannada is at the forefront of all issues that affect Kannadigas - floods, polluting industries, disease, or corruption in public life. TV9 Kannada’s digital offerings on the web, social media, and YouTube have the highest following among all the Kannada news channels.

name: tv9-marathi
description: TV9 Marathi is a responsible news brand which has been consistently delivering news in its purest form. TV9 Marathi became the most preferred Marathi news channel in Maharashtra in 2022. It is the No. 1 channel across both the urban and rural Maharashtra/ Goa markets. With a reach of more than 23 million viewers, it also generates more than 38 million impressions per week. TV9 Marathi is the fastest in providing news to viewers and is driven by the renewed philosophy of “Kalji Tumchi Hith Maharashtrache" (Viewers’ concerns and in the interest of Maharashtra). TV9 Marathi stands for fearless and bold journalism. The channel is led by experienced journalist Mr. Umesh Kumawat, known for his aggressive and fearless style.

title: TV9 Telugu
name: tv9-telugu
description: TV9 entered the Telugu electronic media space in 2004, during its nascent stage. Since that time, TV9’s slogan, “Towards Better Society”, has been not just a mere tagline but the guiding philosophy and driving policy of TV9 Telugu. TV9 has consistently portrayed news as news and has become synonymous with unbiased news and courageous investigative journalism. On behalf of the people, TV9 has unravelled several bribery cases through its powerful sting operations. Over the years, TV9 has stood as the voice of the voiceless and for the betterment of the citizenry. Whether it is an accident, bomb blast, natural calamity, unforeseen incident, political event or a high-profile case, whether it is in India or abroad, the TV9 Telegu team is at the scene first. With its unique news presentation and credibility, TV9 Telugu has become the No.1 news channel in the twin Telugu states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Rajnikanth Vellalacheruvu leads the TV9 Telugu team.

title: FEVA TV
name: feva-tv
description: FEVA TV (First Entertainment Voice of Africa) is a Canada based global television network that caters to the African, Black, and Caribbean audience. The channel deals with music, movies, news, sports, drama, documentaries and other exciting programs that affect the global black community. Since its launch within Canada, the service began expansion globally through distribution agreements with Flow, which saw the channel launch in the summer of 2015 in Flow’s markets in the Caribbean including Antigua, Barbados, Curaçao, Grenada, Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, St. Lucia, and St. Vincent & the Grenadines. In addition, the channel reached its first African distribution agreement with AzamTV, launching on its system in Tanzania, Uganda, Kenya, Burundi, Rwanda, and Malawi.

title: FEVA MUSIC
name: feva-music
description: FEVA MUSIC is a vibrant and captivating music TV channel that celebrates the rich musical heritage of Africans, Blacks, and Caribbeans. It serves as a platform for showcasing the diverse and dynamic sounds that have emerged from these cultures, providing an immersive experience for music enthusiasts worldwide. From Afrobeats and Reggae to Hip-Hop and Dancehall, Soca, Amapiano and many others, FEVA MUSIC is dedicated to bringing the best of African, Black, and Caribbean music to the forefront. With a lineup that features a mix of music videos, live performances, interviews, and documentaries, FEVA MUSIC offers a comprehensive and engaging viewing experience. The channel not only highlights established and emerging artists but also explores the cultural significance and influence of African, Black, and Caribbean music on a global scale. FEVA MUSIC creates an inclusive space that celebrates the power of music to connect people across borders, while also amplifying the voices and stories of underrepresented communities. Whether you're a fan of infectious rhythms, thought-provoking lyrics, or simply looking to discover new musical talents, FEVA MUSIC is your go-to destination for an electrifying journey through the vibrant world of African, Black, and Caribbean music.

title: MomCave
name: momcave
description: MomCave - An edgy alternative to mom bloggers!”--Forbes "It's like Wayne's World for moms!" --Brooklyn Mama MomCave is an award-winning channel of comedy videos for parents with a sense of humor. Sometimes called the anti-Pinterest of Parenting, MomCave has become. thriving online community, producing scripted web series like "SLACKER MOM" and "Slummy Mummy," real-mom docuseries like "Blabbermom", interactive online talk shows like "MomCave LIVE" and even a naughty interactive game show called "MOM GAMES." Being chosen for YouTube's Women in Comedy Initiative, nominated for awards like Best Comedy Duo, Best Live Series, and Best Hosted Series has almost made up for all the times our kids threw up on us.

title: Urban Action Channel
name: urban-action-channel
description: Urban Action Channel - Take a trip back in time and revisit the pulse pounding Urban Action classic movies of the 70's and beyond. From Hollywood to Harlem and back you'll get all the must-see Classics with stars like Fred Williamson, Teresa Graves and lots more. In addition, rarely seen historically significant gems featuring icons such as Josephine Baker and legendary boxing champion  Joe Louis are part of the programming mix.  Comprised of hugely popular 1970's films categorized during the period as a subgenre called Blaxploitation. In 1976 noted New York Times film critic Vincent Canby described these movies as "Supercharged, bad-talking, highly romanticized melodramas about Harlem superstuds". The Urban Action Channel is like taking a trip down the Broadway of Urban History.

title: P18 News
name: p18-news
description: P18 News Channel is a trusted and dynamic news platform that delivers accurate and timely news in  Punjabi language. Committed to truth and responsibility, P18 covers national, regional, and local stories with a sharp focus on the issues that matter most to the people of Punjab and beyond. By presenting news in Punjabi, P18 connects deeply with regional audiences, while its Hindi broadcasts expand its reach to viewers across India. The channel’s motto – “Fast and Factual” – reflects its commitment to delivering news that is both quick and credible. P18 avoids sensationalism and fake news, focusing instead on honest journalism and public interest reporting. Available on TV, digital platforms, and social media, P18 ensures that audiences of all age groups stay connected to what’s happening around them.

description: ABN Andhra Jyothi is a 24x7 Telugu news channel delivering breaking news, live updates, political debates, and exclusive interviews. Launched in 2009 under Aamoda Broadcasting Network, it has become a trusted source for fearless journalism across Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, and beyond. With its tagline “We Report, You Decide,” the channel offers a wide mix of programming—ranging from investigative reports to entertainment and business news. Its flagship talk show Open Heart with RK is among the most watched in Telugu media. ABN also reaches millions digitally through AndhraJyothi.com, extending its legacy of bold and impactful journalism.

description: 4K TRAVEL TV is a 4K channel with breathtaking images in impressive resolution to discover the most fascinating travel destinations, cultures, and heritage. With 4K TRAVEL you will discover the world in 4K. The most amazing destinations that will awaken your curiosity and make you want to know more. 4K TRAVEL takes you to discover the wonders of the world, flying over the most beautiful sites. 4K TRAVEL allows you to know the history of each city visited, its particularity, the origins of its creation and the habits of its people. Thanks to its 4K technology, 4K TRAVEL makes you dive into the image, with a very high definition and a depth of field close to a three-dimensional vision. Travel to new destinations every day, as if you were there.

ENCORE+ is aimed at the largest number of viewers and takes you to the discovery of reference films released from 1980 to today and awarded in the biggest festivals or by peers. Thanks to ENCORE+, the whole family can agree and watch the movie they want. There is something for everyone.

title: KOZOOM TV
name: kozoom-tv
description: Billiards is one of the most played game in the world. Kozoom TV offers free 24/7 billiards programming. You can watch tournaments from around the world, as well as original programming. For amateurs, it is easy to see your favorite players from all over the world compete on the biggest billiards stage! Kozoom TV is broadcasting all kind of billiards matches such as French Billiards, Carom Billiards, or Pool Billiards. Kozoom TV is made by Billiards Professional who live this Sport. But Kozoom TV is not only the biggest competitions, it is also learning how to play billiards with Masterclass videos and great matches of Carom and Pool commented by top players. Kozoom.com is the first European channel dedicated to billiard fans and offers the most complete experience to billiard lovers. Since 1998, Kozoom has been involved in the promotion of billiards, and now Kozoom TV brings you Billiards at home.

title: Bollywood Classic
name: bollywood-classic
description: We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

title: TV9 Bangla
name: tv9-bangla
description: TV9 Bangla was launched in April 2021 in the middle of the second wave of the Covid-19 pandemic. With its fair and robust brand of journalism, TV9 Bangla has created top-of-the-mind recall in a very short period. In the very first year of operations, the channel won accolades at the Indian Telly Awards 2022 in the Best Factual Entertainment Show/Documentary category. In its short journey so far, TV9 Bangla has differentiated itself from competitors in the market with creative and intellectually rich content such as Bangaliana Telethon, Bangaliana Baithak, Nakkhatra Samman and programmes such as News Series. TV9 Bangla is helmed by Amritanshu Bhattacharya.

title: TV9 Bharatvarsh
name: tv9-bharatvarsh
description: TV9 Bharatvarsh has become the country’s most watched national Hindi news channel. It has scripted history to be crowned the No.1 Hindi news channel in the country. The channel’s coverage of landmark news events – such as the Russia-Ukraine war, the Covid-19 pandemic and the Uttar Pradesh election to name just three – marked by its editorial prowess, newsroom innovation, impeccable packaging and unrivaled ground reportage, saw it rise sharply up the ratings ladder. This rise has been consistent over the last two years. Its relaunch in March 2020 coincided with the Covid-19 lockdown. With people confined to their houses for months, news viewership grew exponentially. The channel’s contemporary look and feel and its innovative content offering, received a ready, wide audience. Within three months, the channel rose to the top of the pile hitting the number 2 slot also on a few occasions. The upward trajectory continued until ratings were unfortunately suspended in October 2020. Undeterred, the channel continued to challenge and better itself this was reflected once ratings resumed after 17 months. TV9 Bharatvarsh trounced the legacy leader of 22 years on March 17, 2022. The remarkable turnaround has proved to be historic. Our Hindi flagship channel created several firsts: use of newsroom studios, packaging, and reimagined prime time. TV9 Bharatvarsh has become a case study itself where leadership is manifest in every second of its airtime offering.

title: TV9 Gujarati
name: tv9-gujarati
description: TV9 Gujarati is the leading news platform in Gujarat both in its broadcasting and digital avatars. The Gujarati language platform has been unstoppable since its launch, retaining its leadership position. With its tagline of Garv Chhe Gujarati Chhun (Proud to be Gujarati), TV9 Gujarati has been the chronicler of Gujarati pride. True to its tagline, the platform also celebrates the entrepreneurial spirit of Gujarat. For the discerning audience in Gujarat, TV9 Gujarati is the go-to brand that disseminates clear, precise and insightful news. TV9 Gujarati’s mission has been to continue advancing and improving the quality of news dissemination in Gujarati. Today, Gujaratis all over the world turn to TV9 Gujarati for any news from the region. Be it a natural disaster or an important political development, TV9 Gujarati rises to the occasion to provide structured information to its viewers with people-centricity at the core of its reporting. With a pro-people motto, both the TV and digital platforms of TV9 Gujarati have come to rule the hearts of viewers.

title: TV9 Kannada
name: tv9-kannada
description: TV9 Kannada is Karnataka’s No. 1 news channel by far, with a market bigger than that of its No. 2 and No. 3 rivals combined. The first news channel to be launched in the state in 2006, it has maintained its position as the definitive market leader. TV9 Kannada, part of India’s biggest news network, offers the most comprehensive, authoritative, and unbiased coverage of news across the state, nation, and the world. Its news-based programmes routinely feature among the top shows in BARC’s weekly ratings of news shows. The channel boasts of the biggest news gathering team in the state, with its own dedicated reporters and camerapersons in all of Karnataka’s 31 districts. Over the years, TV9 Kannada has served as the go-to channel for news consumers from across the social strata--be it the common man, the intelligentsia, or the elite. With its sharp focus on fact-checked news breaks and insightful analysis, TV9 Kannada offers the most comprehensive news coverage to viewers. The channel’s guiding principle continues to be “Uttama Samajakkage” - “for a better society”. TV9 Kannada is at the forefront of all issues that affect Kannadigas - floods, polluting industries, disease, or corruption in public life. TV9 Kannada’s digital offerings on the web, social media, and YouTube have the highest following among all the Kannada news channels.

title: TV9 Marathi
name: tv9-marathi
description: TV9 Marathi is a responsible news brand which has been consistently delivering news in its purest form. TV9 Marathi became the most preferred Marathi news channel in Maharashtra in 2022. It is the No. 1 channel across both the urban and rural Maharashtra/ Goa markets. With a reach of more than 23 million viewers, it also generates more than 38 million impressions per week. TV9 Marathi is the fastest in providing news to viewers and is driven by the renewed philosophy of “Kalji Tumchi Hith Maharashtrache" (Viewers’ concerns and in the interest of Maharashtra). TV9 Marathi stands for fearless and bold journalism. The channel is led by experienced journalist Mr. Umesh Kumawat, known for his aggressive and fearless style.

title: TV9 Telugu
name: tv9-telugu
description: TV9 entered the Telugu electronic media space in 2004, during its nascent stage. Since that time, TV9’s slogan, “Towards Better Society”, has been not just a mere tagline but the guiding philosophy and driving policy of TV9 Telugu. TV9 has consistently portrayed news as news and has become synonymous with unbiased news and courageous investigative journalism. On behalf of the people, TV9 has unravelled several bribery cases through its powerful sting operations. Over the years, TV9 has stood as the voice of the voiceless and for the betterment of the citizenry. Whether it is an accident, bomb blast, natural calamity, unforeseen incident, political event or a high-profile case, whether it is in India or abroad, the TV9 Telegu team is at the scene first. With its unique news presentation and credibility, TV9 Telugu has become the No.1 news channel in the twin Telugu states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Rajnikanth Vellalacheruvu leads the TV9 Telugu team.

title: FEVA TV
name: feva-tv
description: FEVA TV (First Entertainment Voice of Africa) is a Canada based global television network that caters to the African, Black, and Caribbean audience. The channel deals with music, movies, news, sports, drama, documentaries and other exciting programs that affect the global black community. Since its launch within Canada, the service began expansion globally through distribution agreements with Flow, which saw the channel launch in the summer of 2015 in Flow’s markets in the Caribbean including Antigua, Barbados, Curaçao, Grenada, Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, St. Lucia, and St. Vincent & the Grenadines. In addition, the channel reached its first African distribution agreement with AzamTV, launching on its system in Tanzania, Uganda, Kenya, Burundi, Rwanda, and Malawi.

title: FEVA MUSIC
name: feva-music
description: FEVA MUSIC is a vibrant and captivating music TV channel that celebrates the rich musical heritage of Africans, Blacks, and Caribbeans. It serves as a platform for showcasing the diverse and dynamic sounds that have emerged from these cultures, providing an immersive experience for music enthusiasts worldwide. From Afrobeats and Reggae to Hip-Hop and Dancehall, Soca, Amapiano and many others, FEVA MUSIC is dedicated to bringing the best of African, Black, and Caribbean music to the forefront. With a lineup that features a mix of music videos, live performances, interviews, and documentaries, FEVA MUSIC offers a comprehensive and engaging viewing experience. The channel not only highlights established and emerging artists but also explores the cultural significance and influence of African, Black, and Caribbean music on a global scale. FEVA MUSIC creates an inclusive space that celebrates the power of music to connect people across borders, while also amplifying the voices and stories of underrepresented communities. Whether you're a fan of infectious rhythms, thought-provoking lyrics, or simply looking to discover new musical talents, FEVA MUSIC is your go-to destination for an electrifying journey through the vibrant world of African, Black, and Caribbean music.

title: Urban Action Channel
name: urban-action-channel
description: Urban Action Channel - Take a trip back in time and revisit the pulse pounding Urban Action classic movies of the 70's and beyond. From Hollywood to Harlem and back you'll get all the must-see Classics with stars like Fred Williamson, Teresa Graves and lots more. In addition, rarely seen historically significant gems featuring icons such as Josephine Baker and legendary boxing champion  Joe Louis are part of the programming mix.  Comprised of hugely popular 1970's films categorized during the period as a subgenre called Blaxploitation. In 1976 noted New York Times film critic Vincent Canby described these movies as "Supercharged, bad-talking, highly romanticized melodramas about Harlem superstuds". The Urban Action Channel is like taking a trip down the Broadway of Urban History.

description: P18 News Channel is a trusted and dynamic news platform that delivers accurate and timely news in  Punjabi language. Committed to truth and responsibility, P18 covers national, regional, and local stories with a sharp focus on the issues that matter most to the people of Punjab and beyond. By presenting news in Punjabi, P18 connects deeply with regional audiences, while its Hindi broadcasts expand its reach to viewers across India. The channel’s motto – “Fast and Factual” – reflects its commitment to delivering news that is both quick and credible. P18 avoids sensationalism and fake news, focusing instead on honest journalism and public interest reporting. Available on TV, digital platforms, and social media, P18 ensures that audiences of all age groups stay connected to what’s happening around them.

description: Billiards is one of the most played game in the world. Kozoom TV offers free 24/7 billiards programming. You can watch tournaments from around the world, as well as original programming. For amateurs, it is easy to see your favorite players from all over the world compete on the biggest billiards stage! Kozoom TV is broadcasting all kind of billiards matches such as French Billiards, Carom Billiards, or Pool Billiards. Kozoom TV is made by Billiards Professional who live this Sport. But Kozoom TV is not only the biggest competitions, it is also learning how to play billiards with Masterclass videos and great matches of Carom and Pool commented by top players. Kozoom.com is the first European channel dedicated to billiard fans and offers the most complete experience to billiard lovers. Since 1998, Kozoom has been involved in the promotion of billiards, and now Kozoom TV brings you Billiards at home.

title: Bollywood Classic
name: bollywood-classic
description: We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

title: TV9 Bangla
name: tv9-bangla
description: TV9 Bangla was launched in April 2021 in the middle of the second wave of the Covid-19 pandemic. With its fair and robust brand of journalism, TV9 Bangla has created top-of-the-mind recall in a very short period. In the very first year of operations, the channel won accolades at the Indian Telly Awards 2022 in the Best Factual Entertainment Show/Documentary category. In its short journey so far, TV9 Bangla has differentiated itself from competitors in the market with creative and intellectually rich content such as Bangaliana Telethon, Bangaliana Baithak, Nakkhatra Samman and programmes such as News Series. TV9 Bangla is helmed by Amritanshu Bhattacharya.

title: TV9 Bharatvarsh
name: tv9-bharatvarsh
description: TV9 Bharatvarsh has become the country’s most watched national Hindi news channel. It has scripted history to be crowned the No.1 Hindi news channel in the country. The channel’s coverage of landmark news events – such as the Russia-Ukraine war, the Covid-19 pandemic and the Uttar Pradesh election to name just three – marked by its editorial prowess, newsroom innovation, impeccable packaging and unrivaled ground reportage, saw it rise sharply up the ratings ladder. This rise has been consistent over the last two years. Its relaunch in March 2020 coincided with the Covid-19 lockdown. With people confined to their houses for months, news viewership grew exponentially. The channel’s contemporary look and feel and its innovative content offering, received a ready, wide audience. Within three months, the channel rose to the top of the pile hitting the number 2 slot also on a few occasions. The upward trajectory continued until ratings were unfortunately suspended in October 2020. Undeterred, the channel continued to challenge and better itself this was reflected once ratings resumed after 17 months. TV9 Bharatvarsh trounced the legacy leader of 22 years on March 17, 2022. The remarkable turnaround has proved to be historic. Our Hindi flagship channel created several firsts: use of newsroom studios, packaging, and reimagined prime time. TV9 Bharatvarsh has become a case study itself where leadership is manifest in every second of its airtime offering.

title: TV9 Gujarati
name: tv9-gujarati
description: TV9 Gujarati is the leading news platform in Gujarat both in its broadcasting and digital avatars. The Gujarati language platform has been unstoppable since its launch, retaining its leadership position. With its tagline of Garv Chhe Gujarati Chhun (Proud to be Gujarati), TV9 Gujarati has been the chronicler of Gujarati pride. True to its tagline, the platform also celebrates the entrepreneurial spirit of Gujarat. For the discerning audience in Gujarat, TV9 Gujarati is the go-to brand that disseminates clear, precise and insightful news. TV9 Gujarati’s mission has been to continue advancing and improving the quality of news dissemination in Gujarati. Today, Gujaratis all over the world turn to TV9 Gujarati for any news from the region. Be it a natural disaster or an important political development, TV9 Gujarati rises to the occasion to provide structured information to its viewers with people-centricity at the core of its reporting. With a pro-people motto, both the TV and digital platforms of TV9 Gujarati have come to rule the hearts of viewers.

title: TV9 Kannada
name: tv9-kannada
description: TV9 Kannada is Karnataka’s No. 1 news channel by far, with a market bigger than that of its No. 2 and No. 3 rivals combined. The first news channel to be launched in the state in 2006, it has maintained its position as the definitive market leader. TV9 Kannada, part of India’s biggest news network, offers the most comprehensive, authoritative, and unbiased coverage of news across the state, nation, and the world. Its news-based programmes routinely feature among the top shows in BARC’s weekly ratings of news shows. The channel boasts of the biggest news gathering team in the state, with its own dedicated reporters and camerapersons in all of Karnataka’s 31 districts. Over the years, TV9 Kannada has served as the go-to channel for news consumers from across the social strata--be it the common man, the intelligentsia, or the elite. With its sharp focus on fact-checked news breaks and insightful analysis, TV9 Kannada offers the most comprehensive news coverage to viewers. The channel’s guiding principle continues to be “Uttama Samajakkage” - “for a better society”. TV9 Kannada is at the forefront of all issues that affect Kannadigas - floods, polluting industries, disease, or corruption in public life. TV9 Kannada’s digital offerings on the web, social media, and YouTube have the highest following among all the Kannada news channels.

title: TV9 Marathi
name: tv9-marathi
description: TV9 Marathi is a responsible news brand which has been consistently delivering news in its purest form. TV9 Marathi became the most preferred Marathi news channel in Maharashtra in 2022. It is the No. 1 channel across both the urban and rural Maharashtra/ Goa markets. With a reach of more than 23 million viewers, it also generates more than 38 million impressions per week. TV9 Marathi is the fastest in providing news to viewers and is driven by the renewed philosophy of “Kalji Tumchi Hith Maharashtrache" (Viewers’ concerns and in the interest of Maharashtra). TV9 Marathi stands for fearless and bold journalism. The channel is led by experienced journalist Mr. Umesh Kumawat, known for his aggressive and fearless style.

title: TV9 Telugu
name: tv9-telugu
description: TV9 entered the Telugu electronic media space in 2004, during its nascent stage. Since that time, TV9’s slogan, “Towards Better Society”, has been not just a mere tagline but the guiding philosophy and driving policy of TV9 Telugu. TV9 has consistently portrayed news as news and has become synonymous with unbiased news and courageous investigative journalism. On behalf of the people, TV9 has unravelled several bribery cases through its powerful sting operations. Over the years, TV9 has stood as the voice of the voiceless and for the betterment of the citizenry. Whether it is an accident, bomb blast, natural calamity, unforeseen incident, political event or a high-profile case, whether it is in India or abroad, the TV9 Telegu team is at the scene first. With its unique news presentation and credibility, TV9 Telugu has become the No.1 news channel in the twin Telugu states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. Rajnikanth Vellalacheruvu leads the TV9 Telugu team.

title: FEVA TV
name: feva-tv
description: FEVA TV (First Entertainment Voice of Africa) is a Canada based global television network that caters to the African, Black, and Caribbean audience. The channel deals with music, movies, news, sports, drama, documentaries and other exciting programs that affect the global black community. Since its launch within Canada, the service began expansion globally through distribution agreements with Flow, which saw the channel launch in the summer of 2015 in Flow’s markets in the Caribbean including Antigua, Barbados, Curaçao, Grenada, Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, St. Lucia, and St. Vincent & the Grenadines. In addition, the channel reached its first African distribution agreement with AzamTV, launching on its system in Tanzania, Uganda, Kenya, Burundi, Rwanda, and Malawi.

title: FEVA MUSIC
name: feva-music
description: FEVA MUSIC is a vibrant and captivating music TV channel that celebrates the rich musical heritage of Africans, Blacks, and Caribbeans. It serves as a platform for showcasing the diverse and dynamic sounds that have emerged from these cultures, providing an immersive experience for music enthusiasts worldwide. From Afrobeats and Reggae to Hip-Hop and Dancehall, Soca, Amapiano and many others, FEVA MUSIC is dedicated to bringing the best of African, Black, and Caribbean music to the forefront. With a lineup that features a mix of music videos, live performances, interviews, and documentaries, FEVA MUSIC offers a comprehensive and engaging viewing experience. The channel not only highlights established and emerging artists but also explores the cultural significance and influence of African, Black, and Caribbean music on a global scale. FEVA MUSIC creates an inclusive space that celebrates the power of music to connect people across borders, while also amplifying the voices and stories of underrepresented communities. Whether you're a fan of infectious rhythms, thought-provoking lyrics, or simply looking to discover new musical talents, FEVA MUSIC is your go-to destination for an electrifying journey through the vibrant world of African, Black, and Caribbean music.

Sometimes called the anti-Pinterest of Parenting, MomCave has become. thriving online community, producing scripted web series like "SLACKER MOM" and "Slummy Mummy," real-mom docuseries like "Blabbermom", interactive online talk shows like "MomCave LIVE" and even a naughty interactive game show called "MOM GAMES." title: Urban Action Channel
name: urban-action-channel
description: Urban Action Channel - Take a trip back in time and revisit the pulse pounding Urban Action classic movies of the 70's and beyond. From Hollywood to Harlem and back you'll get all the must-see Classics with stars like Fred Williamson, Teresa Graves and lots more. In addition, rarely seen historically significant gems featuring icons such as Josephine Baker and legendary boxing champion  Joe Louis are part of the programming mix.  Comprised of hugely popular 1970's films categorized during the period as a subgenre called Blaxploitation. In 1976 noted New York Times film critic Vincent Canby described these movies as "Supercharged, bad-talking, highly romanticized melodramas about Harlem superstuds". The Urban Action Channel is like taking a trip down the Broadway of Urban History.
